nasb.text: And He came and took the book out of the right hand of Him who sat on the throne.

esv.text: And he went and took the scroll from the right hand of him who was seated on the throne.

cnv.text: 羊羔走過去，從坐在寶座上那位的右手中取了書卷。

ccb.text: 那羔羊走上前去，从坐在宝座上的那位右手中接过书卷。

csbs.text: 羔羊上前去，从坐在宝座上那一位的右手中拿了书卷。
